purpose: Phase 1 item 1.4 verification: primary sources cited by 'The Trellis and the Cage' (Greenbriar, 2026-07). Verification/preservation only; not charge material.

custody_conditions.note: Binaries in original/ are git-ignored and ephemeral (capture container). manifest.json (sha256 + source_url) is the durable, re-fetchable record. VERIFIED needs a 2nd custodian + off-platform backup.
